title: FAMILY AND BEHAVIORAL MEDICINE - 211info
text: PORT ORFORD FAMILY AND BEHAVIORAL MEDICINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides integrated primary and behavioral health care services to the community. Services may include general medical exams, Hepatitis C screening and treatment, tobacco cessation, support for diabetes, pain management, postpartum mental health, mental health screenings, limited individual counseling, therapy referrals, and vaccinations. 1312 Tichenor Avenue Port Orford, OR 97465 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies by site (541) 332-1114 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 332-1114 Reception Main phone (541) 332-1114 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Accepts most major insurance plans, Oregon Health Plan and Medicare. Offers a sliding scale fee for uninsured patients DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Coos and Curry Counties SITE HOURS: Wednesday 8am-4:30pm Services: Childhood Immunization Contraception Diabetes Management Clinics General Medical Care Hepatitis Testing Individual Counseling Integrated Physical/Mental Health Services Postpartum Care Smoking/Vaping Cessation Therapy Referrals Vaccine Information Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OUTREACH AND ENROLLMENT HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON CONTRACEPTIVE CARE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. PORT ORFORD
